---
kind: task_template
name: Portfolio Health Review
description: Review every portfolio asset for keep, grow, or retire decisions
schema: agentcompanies/v1
assignee: launch-lead
project: studio-os
recurring: true
---

For each portfolio asset, review:

- MRR last 7 and 30 days
- refunds
- activation quality
- support burden
- incidents
- next decision: keep, grow, or retire
- customer-world-model delta
